metadata.description: Water's personal collection of AI skills, featuring content publishing, information collection, trend analysis, app review insights, magazine-style deck generation, wiki building, and project harness generation.

plugins.name: wtt-auto-poster-skills
plugins.description: Automated content publishing to Zhihu and WeChat Official Account with Mac-style code blocks and smart image handling.

plugins.name: wtt-info-collector-skills
plugins.description: Config-driven information collection framework with modular data sources and automated report generation.

plugins.name: wtt-trend-radar-skills
plugins.description: Multi-platform real-time trend aggregation and analysis across 11+ platforms with keyword filtering.

plugins.name: wtt-app-review-insights-skills
plugins.description: App Store review insights analyzer that extracts pain points, opportunities, user segments, and actionable recommendations.

plugins.name: wtt-magazine-deck-skills
plugins.description: Magazine-style HTML deck generator for editorial and swiss presentation systems with self-contained output.

plugins.name: wtt-llm-wiki-builder-skills
plugins.description: Build, compile, and maintain LLM-friendly wiki knowledge bases from scattered markdown files.

plugins.name: wtt-project-harness-generator-skills
plugins.description: Scan project DNA and generate CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and rules with coding discipline, UI/UX, and architecture conventions.
